_README: STARTER content only. Replace the variant text with YOUR real Tank Mix playbook copy (T1–T8). The link never goes in the body — it goes in the first comment. Categories used: operators, farmer_operators, drone_curious, specialty. Image types: hero, rate_card, quote_card, screenshot. Edit here OR in the Templates tab of the dashboard.

templates.name: Rate question
variants: What are you charging per acre this season? Curious how the numbers look across regions right now.
Operators — what's your going rate per acre this year? Trying to get a real picture beyond the usual guesses.
Spray drone folks: per-acre rate check. What are you actually charging in 2026, and is it holding up against fuel and chem costs?

templates.name: Gear / setup
variants: What's in your spray rig this season? Drone, mix, nozzles — curious what setups are actually working.
Building out a spray setup and comparing notes. What gear has earned its place for you, and what did you regret buying?

templates.name: Regulation / compliance
variants: Part 137 / licensing question — how are you handling the paperwork side this year? It's the part nobody warns you about.
Regs check: what's changed for ag drone operators where you are this season? Trying to keep a running list.

templates.name: Tank mix tips
variants: Tank mix order matters more than people think. What's your go-to sequence to avoid antagonism in the tank?
Mixing question: what combos have burned you, and what do you keep separate no matter what?

templates.name: Results / before-after
variants: Field results from this pass came in better than expected. Anyone else seeing a difference going to drone application this year?
Coverage comparison: drone vs ground rig on the same field. The edges and wet spots are where it really showed.

templates.name: New operator intro
variants: Just getting into spray drone work this season. What's the one thing you wish someone told you in year one?
Starting out in ag drones — what would you prioritize first: hours, licensing, or a bigger tank?

templates.name: Specialty / niche
variants: For the specialty crowd (food plots, orchards, vineyards) — how are you adapting drone spraying to tighter spaces?
Niche application question: what's working for the awkward fields the big rigs can't reach well?

templates.name: DJI ban / market shift
variants: With all the DJI uncertainty, what's your backup plan on hardware? Curious who's already switching and to what.
If DJI gets restricted, how big a hit is that to your operation? Trying to gauge how exposed everyone actually is.
